name: sanity-template-nextjs-i18n
description: Next.js + Sanity template — module pattern, field-level i18n with fallback chain, Visual Editing

scripts.//dev: Starts both web (3000) and studio (3333) in parallel — comment out one filter or use `web:dev`/`studio:dev` to run only one.

author: backendforth

pnpm.//overrides: magicast pin avoids the older transitive 0.2.x version pulled in by some Sanity tooling, which lacks the `parseExpression` API used downstream. Re-evaluate when removing — drop the override and run `pnpm why magicast` to confirm only ^0.3 versions remain.
